# ui-badge



<!-- Auto Generated Below -->


## Properties

| Property    | Attribute   | Description                          | Type                                                                                | Default     |
| ----------- | ----------- | ------------------------------------ | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------- |
| `dot`       | `dot`       | Exibe um ponto colorido à esquerda.  | `boolean`                                                                           | `false`     |
| `removable` | `removable` | Exibe um botão para remover o badge. | `boolean`                                                                           | `false`     |
| `variant`   | `variant`   | Variante visual.                     | `"danger" \| "default" \| "info" \| "outline" \| "solid" \| "success" \| "warning"` | `"default"` |


## Events

| Event      | Description                            | Type                |
| ---------- | -------------------------------------- | ------------------- |
| `uiRemove` | Emitido ao clicar no botão de remover. | `CustomEvent<void>` |
